name: Orion Group Holdings Inc
summary: Orion Group Holdings, Inc. is a specialty construction company focused on marine and infrastructure sectors. Its marine business provides engineering, construction, dredging, and specialty services to federal, state, local, and private clients across the U.S., Canada, and Caribbean. Its concrete business delivers structural concrete construction for data centers, industrial facilities, commercial buildings, and multi-family residential projects. The company operates from Houston, Texas with regional offices throughout its operating areas.

products.name: Marine Construction
products.description: Construction and rehabilitation of terminals, Navy facilities, bridges, causeways, and waterfront infrastructure.

products.name: Dredging Services
products.description: Maintenance and capital dredging for ports, waterways, channels, and beach nourishment projects.

products.name: Pipeline and Utility Marine Services
products.description: Installation and removal of underwater pipelines, river crossings, intakes, and outfalls.

products.name: Environmental and Coastal Restoration
products.description: Construction of levees, erosion control systems, wetlands restoration, and geotube installations.

products.name: Specialty Marine Services
products.description: Salvage, demolition, surveying, towing, commercial diving, and underwater inspection.

products.name: Concrete Construction
products.description: Structural concrete for data centers, industrial facilities, commercial, multi-family, and institutional buildings.

products.name: Data Center Construction
products.description: Concrete construction services for hyperscale data centers; over 40 completed for world-class hyperscalers.

products.name: Industrial and Distribution Facility Construction
products.description: Concrete foundations, tilt-wall structures, and floors for warehouses and large-scale distribution centers.
